Defines macros for C/C++ compatibility, system file status functions, and data types for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[cdefs.h](cdefs.h.md)**: Defines macros for C/C++ compatibility and string manipulation.
- **[stat.h](stat.h.md)**: Header file stub for system file status and information functions.
- **[types.h](types.h.md)**: Defines data types `ssize_t`, `time_t`, and `off_t` for the Pebble firmware.
